summary: Completed testing of Advanced Roles and Permissions System. All 14 backend tests passed. All 8 frontend role options verified with descriptions.

minor.issue: Duplicate endpoint definition at lines 5955 and 6010 in server.py - first one is correct with 9 roles, second one only has 3 roles. Not causing issues since first one is matched first.

passed_tests.details: Returns roles: super_admin, admin, manager, sales_supervisor, seller, inventory_manager, ecommerce_manager, accountant, user
Each role has full permission object with granular actions
All 9 roles have Arabic and French descriptions
6 categories: sales_operations, inventory_operations, hr_operations, financial, system, services
Returns 6 permission categories with Arabic/French names and associated permissions
Correctly has sales reports=true, financial reports=false, inventory reports=false, refund=true, discount=true
Correctly has inventory reports=true, financial reports=false, stock_adjust=true, transfer=true
Correctly has financial reports=true, advanced reports=true, pos=false, expenses approve=true
Has price_change, stock_adjust, refund, discount, credit, blacklist, saas_admin
Cannot price_change, add products, refund, or discount. Only basic POS and sales view/add

passed_tests.feature: Frontend: Add User dialog shows 8 roles
passed_tests.details: Dropdown shows all roles except super_admin: بائع, مشرف مبيعات, مدير مخزون, مسؤول متجر إلكتروني, محاسب, مشرف, مدير, مستخدم عادي
When selecting a role, description appears below dropdown (e.g., 'إشراف على المبيعات والعملاء' for sales_supervisor)
Each role has a colored bullet: seller(green), sales_supervisor(teal), inventory_manager(orange), etc.

critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate endpoint /api/permissions/roles defined at lines 5955 and 6010 in server.py - recommend removing duplicate at line 6010
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced Roles and Permissions fully tested. Backend has 9 roles (super_admin, admin, manager, sales_supervisor, seller, inventory_manager, ecommerce_manager, accountant, user). Frontend Add User dialog shows 8 roles (excludes super_admin). Each role has Arabic/French descriptions and color-coded indicators. Permission categories organize permissions into 6 groups. Key new roles: sales_supervisor (sales reports only), inventory_manager (inventory reports only), accountant (financial reports only). Advanced permissions include: price_change, stock_adjust, refund, discount, credit, blacklist.
